research.summary: OEM customers - Danfoss https://www. danfoss. com/en/products/dcs/compressors/danfoss-turbocor/turbocor/oem-customers/ Danfoss serves large HVAC chiller manufacturers (OEMs) with the Danfoss Turbocor® portfolio of compressors.

outreach_notes: 该公司为Tier1重要目标。建议联系出口/采购负责人，强调 Farreach 的 OEM 产能优势（越南工厂月产 80 万件）和价格竞争力。
